title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 01 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 01 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 01 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 01/02/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.69% today, the main contract closed 867.The traders' willingnessto ship is more. The steel mills are active to purchase .The overall trading sentiment of the market is better.PBF at Shandong port deal 880-885 yuan/mt, increase 1-4 yuan/ mt.PBF at Tangshan port deal 880-885 yuan/mt,decrease 5-10yuan /mt. The Federal Reserve will announce its interest rate decision on Wednesday afternoon, US Eastern Time.
